verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Hover o'er me, Holy Spirit, Bathe my trembling heart and brow; Fill me with Thy hallowed presence, Come, Oh come and fill me now.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Fill me now, fill me now, Jesus, come and fill me now; Fill me with Thy hallowed presence, Come, Oh come and fill me now.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Thou canst fill me, gracious Spirit, Though I cannot tell Thee how; But I need Thee, greatly need Thee, Come, Oh come and fill me now.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am weakness, full of weakness, At thy sacred feet I bow; Blest, divine, eternal Spirit, Fill with pow'r, and fill me now.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Cleanse and comfort, Bless and save me, Bathe, Oh bathe my heart and brow; Thou art comforting and saving, Thou art sweetly filling now.
